metadata.title: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận
metadata.description: Bà bầu duyên dáng bên bên hoa mận tại Mộc Châu

attributes.location: Thung lũng mận Nà Ka – Sơn La

photos.content:
CONCEPT:
Tender maternity portrait celebrating motherhood.

BACKGROUND:
White plum blossoms surrounding both sides of the path, golden hour light.

OUTFIT:
Soft white maternity chiffon dress, flowy, gently revealing belly shape.

POSE & FRAMING:
Medium shot, looking down at belly with tender smile, both hands holding bump, emotional motherly moment.

LIGHTING & STYLE:
Warm peach sunset light, glowing skin, shallow depth of field, dreamy cinematic maternity photography.

Add a small handwritten-style watermark that reads ‘Prompt by: anph21’. Use a beautiful cursive font, thin strokes, low opacity, placed at the bottom right. Don’t change the face of reference image

photos.content:
CONCEPT:
Tender maternity portrait celebrating motherhood.

BACKGROUND:
White plum blossoms surrounding both sides of the path, golden hour light.

OUTFIT:
Soft white maternity chiffon dress, flowy, gently revealing belly shape.

POSE & FRAMING:
Walking slowly along the path, one hand holding belly, the other lifting dress hem, fabric flowing in wind, natural candid motherhood feeling.

Warm peach sunset light, glowing skin, shallow depth of field, dreamy cinematic maternity photography.
